checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 071 implements the requested serious autonomous loop in order: stale scope cleanup, two bounded Claude Code executor slices, a small real documentation payload, runtime-run evidence capture, hardened audit validation, and autonomy metrics.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: AC-182 through AC-215 are represented by runtime-run command support, runtime-run validation, autonomy metrics command support, autonomy metrics validation, issue 071 contract, scope, handoff, executor packets, launch plans, executor evidence, runtime runs, runtime results, runtime summaries, final report, audit packet, and audit evidence.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The task stayed inside the issue 071 contract. Claude Code wrote only the declared exclusive executor paths. Coordinator-owned artifacts stayed in declared paths. No protected resource, production configuration, billing, auth, database, dependency installation, CI/CD weakening, or deployment work was performed.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: Both executor slices used Read and Write tools only and the runtime-run, runtime-result, and runtime-summary artifacts preserve false execution policy booleans for shell execution, network, secrets, production, dependency installation, and deployment.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are listed in the final report and covered by the issue 071 scope manifest. Issue 069 scope status was updated to completed as stale memory cleanup. Local untracked .agents and .claude/settings.local.json remain outside staged task scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Contract, scope, executor packet, runtime launch, runtime-run, runtime result, runtime summary, autonomy metrics, standard validation, CLI tests, negative validation tests, final report validation, audit packet validation, ChatGPT audit validation, smoke validation, security gate, review gate, and git diff whitespace validation are recorded as passed.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local CI-equivalent validation passed. GitHub PR CI remains a required external merge gate and must pass before automatic merge.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records the two bounded Claude executor runs, changed files, local validation evidence, pending GitHub PR CI, no deployment, and the next real feature pilot as unresolved future work.

findings.evidence: The autonomy metrics artifact records summary_count 2, ready_count 2, blocked_count 0, executor_count 2, validation_totals.failed 0, validation_totals.other 0, and policy_gate_ready_rate 1.
findings.recommendation: Use the next dedicated contract to run a small real feature through the same multi-executor evidence chain.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and checks run.
The next real feature pilot still needs a dedicated execution contract before broader runtime automation expands.
